tasks.subject: Task 1: Downloader parent-directory hygiene fix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert a one-line `target_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)` in `download_one` so artifacts whose `filename` contains `/` write correctly.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py:232-233
- Test: tests/core/test_downloader.py (1 new test)

**Acceptance Criteria:** subpath filename succeeds; existing leaf-filename tests stay green; mkdir idempotent.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_downloader.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/downloader.py", "tests/core/test_downloader.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_downloader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["download_one with subpath filename succeeds", "existing leaf-filename tests stay green", "mkdir is idempotent (exist_ok=True)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Parser + Link header helper + FetchCallable type
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land pure helpers: `_parse_hf_ref`, `_next_cursor_from_link`, `FetchCallable`. No behaviour change to `resolve()` yet.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py
- Test: tests/sources/test_huggingface.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** parser handles all 4 grammar shapes; Link-cursor helper extracts rel=next cursor; FetchCallable exported; existing 11 tests stay green.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py -v → 17 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py", "tests/sources/test_huggingface.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_parse_hf_ref handles all 4 grammar shapes", "_next_cursor_from_link extracts the rel=next cursor", "FetchCallable type alias is exported", "existing 11 tests stay green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Refactor single-file branch to use parser + support @rev
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewire `resolve()` through `_parse_hf_ref`; new `_single_file_artifact` interpolates revision into URL. Bare-repo branch still raises ValidationError (Task 4 replaces).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py
- Test: tests/sources/test_huggingface.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** @v1.0 interpolates into URL; default main preserved; bare-repo still raises; existing single-file ACs stay green.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py -v → 19 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py", "tests/sources/test_huggingface.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["@v1.0 interpolates into resolve URL", "default revision remains main", "bare-repo still ValidationErrors (deferred to Task 4)", "all single-file ACs stay green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tree branch — bare-repo listing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace bare-repo raise with `_list_tree_artifacts` → fetches recursive tree, paginates, emits one Artifact per file with LFS-oid sha256 + subdir-preserving filename + size + Auth header.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py
- Test: tests/sources/test_huggingface.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** filter type==file; subdirs preserved; lfs.oid lowercased onto sha256; non-LFS sha256=None; size populated; Auth header attached; pagination accumulates + terminates; recursive=true URL; cursor URL-encoded; empty→[]; AuthError propagates; revision threaded; bare-ref no longer raises.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py tests/sources/ -v → 32 pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/sources/huggingface/__init__.py", "tests/sources/test_huggingface.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/sources/test_huggingface.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one Artifact per type=='file' entry; directory filtered", "subdirs preserved in filename", "lfs.oid lowercased onto sha256", "non-LFS entry sha256=None", "size populated", "Authorization header attached when HF_TOKEN set", "pagination accumulates all pages", "recursive=true on first URL", "cursor URL-encoded on subsequent pages", "empty file list returns []", "AuthError propagated", "revision threaded into both tree URL and artifact URL", "bare ref no longer raises ValidationError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Provisioner generic multi-artifact guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Source-agnostic check in provisioner.provision: if `len(artifacts) > 1 and entry.sha256 is not None` → ValidationError. Closes latent CivitAI bug as side effect.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/provisioner.py
- Test: tests/core/test_provisioner.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** multi-artifact + sha256 raises with ref + count in msg; multi-artifact + sha256=None passes through; single-artifact + sha256 still merges; error msg includes migration suggestions.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_provisioner.py tests/core/ tests/sources/ -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/provisioner.py", "tests/core/test_provisioner.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_provisioner.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["multi-artifact + sha256 set raises ValidationError with count and ref in message", "multi-artifact + sha256=None merges and forwards normally", "single-artifact + sha256 set still merges as before", "error message includes the migration suggestions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Live smoke + examples + README + PROGRESS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live smoke (KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1) + example YAML bare-repo alternative + README grammar table + PROGRESS Phase 30 entry. Closes #8.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Live smoke must be manually exercised once with KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1 by Dr. Twinklebrane outside the agent flow; capture artifact summary and paste into PROGRESS Phase 30 'Live-smoke confirmation' before close.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/sources/test_huggingface_live.py
- Modify: examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: PROGRESS.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** live smoke skipped unless KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1; example YAML round-trip clean + bare-repo comment present; README has 4-row grammar table; PROGRESS Phase 30 entry with per-task SHAs; pixi run test ~1062±2; pre-commit all-files clean; GH #8 row → CLOSED; manual run PASS with summary pasted into PROGRESS.

**Verify:** pixi run test -v && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files; manual KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1 run reported to controller

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/sources/test_huggingface_live.py", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -v && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["live smoke skipped unless KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1", "example YAML round-trip loads cleanly with bare-repo comment", "README has new grammar table", "PROGRESS Phase 30 entry present with per-task SHAs", "GH #8 marked CLOSED", "test count ~1062 ± 2", "pre-commit all-files clean", "manual KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1 run PASS with summary pasted into PROGRESS"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["KINOFORGE_LIVE_HF=1", "live smoke PASS"], ["pixi run test -v", "1062 collected"]]}
```
